As a kid, I dreamed of becoming either an astronaut or a software developer. Somehow, I ended up somewhere in between: a Kubestronaut — which feels like the perfect evolution of both worlds.  I’m driven by curiosity and a deep passion for technology. I enjoy working across the boundaries of infrastructure and software, connecting systems and solving complex technical challenges. The more intricate the problem, the more motivated I become.  Earlier in my career I stepped into a management role, leading an amazing team and learning a great deal about collaboration and leadership. Over time, I realized that my strongest energy comes from hands-on engineering — designing systems, building solutions, and diving deep into technology. Today I’m back in a software development role within the cloud-native ecosystem, where I feel completely at home.  When I’m not behind a terminal, you’ll probably find me exploring new tech, learning something Kubernetes-related, or negotiating keyboard space with my cats.
